title: "Best of George" winners announced
description: GEORGE NEWS - Over the past four months, our...
bodyText:
Gallery

GEORGE NEWS - Over the past four months, our readers have spoken and it gives us great pleasure to announce and congratulate the winners of the


> 2024 Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards!


Thank you to the people of George – your nominations and votes for your favourite businesses in George are the foundation of this project.

The overwhelming response and participation from our loyal readers, and the community’s shared excitement has reaffirmed what we believed could be an uplifting and enriching project for businesses in our beautiful town.

PHOTO GALLERY: 2024 Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards Winners!

Lots of respect to every nominated business, and a massive congratulations to each of our 2024 category winners – you make George proud!


> The 2024 winners are: Click here to see the full list of winners


The 2024 Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards! supplement is also available in today's issue of the George Herald.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
